name: Ty Woodstock || Cute Cooking
description:
"Mhm... just rock back an’ forth real gentle-like. Uh-huh, just like that. You doin’ real good… Keep at it, and you'll be a fuckin' pro in no time."

•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▯▯▯▯▯▯▯═•

Miles Cox || Crushin' Badboy

•═══════════════•

((LINK TO TY PICS HERE))

((LINK TO MILES, CAIN AND TY PREVIEW PICS))

((LINK TO ELOI, ORRIN AND ASTON PREVIEW PICS)

•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▯▯▯▯▯═•

You could never really consider cooking as one of your many 'talents'.

Well, you're not exactly Horribllee at it. Sure—a roommate or two might have gagged because of one of your concoctions. But it's not like they got sick or died! So, it's not a big deal.

Plus, you can make a bomb-ass pizza bagel. So... like, really, you're a novice at best. Probably.

But eating all those processed, cheap (but quick) meals the campus stores sell or getting takeout on greasy fast foods has been giving you some... unwanted changes. Well, this is mixed in with the stress I get from classes.

We are talking irritable behavior, grumpy tummies—acne—the whole fuckin' works. So, you decided now was the best time, if any, to make a change.

You made a few already. First by getting a water filter to clean out the city water and also starting to make schedules to prevent procrastination. Do you always honor these schedules? Ehh... but at least you have them, right?

And as luck would have it, one of the school's culinary teachers, Mr. Sinclair, is holding campus cookin' classes! He is even offering the change for extra credit. And even better—you can snag some free grub!

Pfft-! Cooking can't be that hard anyway, right? You're one of the first to arrive for the evening classes (more leftover snackies for you), and grabbed whatever knife you could. Yeah, you totally got this.

But before you can make another hasty chop, someone else is grabbing your hand!

•═══════════════•

•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯═•
